title: wolfhsm-src: WolfSslMode enum is dead code
description: locate_wolfssl_headers() returns WolfSslMode as its third tuple element. The caller binds it to _wolfssl_mode and never uses it. The enum variants are constructed but never matched, providing zero information. Remove the third return value and the WolfSslMode enum entirely; the mode distinction isn't needed by wolfhsm-src (it always sets WOLFSSL_USER_SETTINGS).
